sentences.arabic: فِي يَوْمِ العِيدِ، يَلْبَسُ النَّاسُ مَلَابِسَ جَدِيدَةً.
sentences.translation: Na dan Bajrama, ljudi oblače novu odjeću.
sentences.translationEn: On Eid day, people wear new clothes.
They go to the mosque for the Eid prayer.

sentences.translation: Nakon namaza, posjećuju rodbinu i prijatelje.
sentences.translationEn: After the prayer, they visit relatives and friends.

sentences.translation: Jedu slatkiše i daju djeci bajramluке.
sentences.translationEn: They eat sweets and give children Eid money.

sentences.translation: Bajram je sretno vrijeme za sve.
sentences.translationEn: Eid is a happy time for everyone.
